summary: Complete testing of ScadenziarioPage fintech-style visual restyling. All 10 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified: (1) 3 KPI cards (Uscite Previste, Entrate Previste, Saldo Stimato) with correct data-testids and month names, (2) Alert banner for overdue items appears correctly, (3) Filter pills work - clicking 'Pagamento' shows only payments, 'Tutti' resets, (4) Transaction cards display avatars/initials, entity names, amounts with +/- prefix, dates, status pills, (5) 3 sections visible (SCADUTI with red border, IN SCADENZA with amber, FUTURO collapsed by default), (6) 'Segna Pagato' button triggers payment registration with toast, (7) Sync SDI button present and functional.

kpi_uscite_card.feature: KPI card data-testid='kpi-uscite' with Uscite Previste
kpi_uscite_card.details: Displays month name (Marzo), formatted currency, scadute/in_scadenza counts

kpi_entrate_card.feature: KPI card data-testid='kpi-entrate' with Entrate Previste
kpi_entrate_card.details: Shows expected incassi from emesse invoices with green styling

kpi_saldo_card.feature: KPI card data-testid='kpi-saldo' with Saldo Stimato
kpi_saldo_card.details: Shows Entrate - Uscite calculation, changes color based on positive/negative

alert_scaduti_banner.feature: Alert banner data-testid='alert-scaduti' for overdue items
alert_scaduti_banner.details: Displays count and total of scadute items in red banner

filter_pills.feature: Filter pills (Tutti, Pagamento, Incasso, Patentino, Taratura, Consegna)
filter_pills.details: All filters with data-testid='filter-{tipo}' work correctly, filtering cards

transaction_cards.feature: TransactionCard component with avatar initials, amounts, status pills
transaction_cards.details: Cards show entity avatar, name, subtitle, +/- amount prefix, date, status badge

section_in_scadenza.feature: IN SCADENZA section with amber border-left
section_in_scadenza.details: data-testid='section-in', shows current month name, expandable

segna_pagato_button.feature: 'Segna Pagato' button (check icon) on payment-type items

backend_dashboard_endpoint.details: Returns {scadenze: [], kpi: {}} with all required fields for fintech display

test_credentials: Created test user with session token for testing, cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Created test fatture_ricevute (scaduto, in_scadenza, futuro), invoices with scadenze_pagamento, and supplier - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: ScadenziarioPage fintech visual restyling complete and functional. Key components: (1) ScadenziarioPage.js uses DashboardLayout with 3 KPI cards at top, (2) TransactionCard component displays individual deadlines with avatars, (3) ScadenzeSection component groups by stato (scaduto/in_scadenza/ok), (4) Backend endpoint at /api/fatture-ricevute/scadenziario/dashboard aggregates pagamenti, incassi, patentini, tarature, consegne, (5) Filter pills use filterTipo state with data-testid='filter-{tipo}', (6) Pay button triggers handleMarkPaid which calls POST /{id}/pagamenti API.
